sources.js/views/cardView.js:
import icons from "../../${icons}.svg"; import defaultImg from "../../assets/main-sections/default-photo.png"; class CardView { _checkOpenTime(time) { const openTime = time || "目前尚無開放時間資料"; return openTime.length > 13 ? "請點擊查看詳情" : openTime; } cardThemeRouter = { ScenicSpot: this._generateMarkupScenicSpot.bind(this), Hotel: this._generateMarkupHotel.bind(this), Restaurant: this._generateMarkupRestaurant.bind(this), Activity: this._generateMarkupActivity.bind(this), }; _generateMarkupScenicSpot(result) { return `

${ result.ScenicSpotName }

${ result.City || result.Address?.slice(0, 3) || "目前並無資料" }

${this._checkOpenTime( result.OpenTime )}

 `; } _generateMarkupHotel(result) { return `

${result.HotelName}

${result.Phone}

${result.Address}

 `; } _generateMarkupRestaurant(result) { return `

${ result.RestaurantName }

${result.Phone}

${result.Address}

 `; } _generateMarkupActivity(result) { return `

${result.ActivityName}

${result.Phone || "暫無提供"}

${result.Address}

 `; } } export default new CardView();
